default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Siit.io and GrowthX to align on content strategy and next steps for their engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Siit.io is pivoting to focus on the ITSM market, requiring website/content overhaul](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Current content strategy is minimal; GrowthX will help develop comprehensive approach](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Key goals: Achieve $3M ARR by end of year, expand sales team, build brand recognition](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Next steps: GrowthX to conduct research, develop initial strategy for follow-up meeting](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)

## Topics

### Company & Product Overview

  - [Siit.io provides a conversational, integrated, and AI-automated ITSM platform](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Key differentiators: Slack/Teams integration, unified tech stack, AI automation](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Target market: SMBs and mid-market companies, primarily those without existing solutions](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Exploring potential to sell partial product (e.g. workflow component) to enterprises](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### Content Strategy Development

  - [Current strategy minimal - mostly blog posts written by CEO based on sales conversations](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=2408.0)
  - [GrowthX to help develop comprehensive strategy, focusing initially on blog content](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=2427.0)
  - [Will explore opportunities for site pages, customer stories, and other content types](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=2592.0)
  - [Aim to ramp up to 10+ articles/week, published strategically to avoid overwhelming](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)

### Target Audience & Positioning

  - [Primary focus: IT teams in SMBs/mid-market without existing ITSM solutions](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Secondary: Companies looking to replace frustrating legacy systems](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [Exploring: Partial product sales to enterprises as foot-in-the-door strategy](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Working with Fletch PMM on refining positioning and messaging](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Goals & Metrics

  - [Achieve $3M ARR by end of year (2025)](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Expand sales team from current 3 to more in H2 if targets met](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Build brand recognition in ITSM space](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Increase organic website traffic and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)

### Collaboration Process

  - [GrowthX to use Slack (shared channel) and Notion for communication/documentation](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Carmel (CMO) to be primary point of contact for content approvals](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=2469.0)
  - [GrowthX requests access to Webflow CMS, Google Search Console, Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=3015.0)

### Website Considerations

  - [Siit.io planning website redesign in coming months](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=3176.0)
  - [GrowthX offers support on SEO considerations for migration](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=3192.0)
  - [Brand style guidelines to be developed as part of engagement](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=3155.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Siit.io to provide access to requested tools/platforms](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=3015.0)
  - [Siit.io to review and provide feedback on GrowthX's brand/product documentation](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=3379.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct initial research and competitive analysis](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=2427.0)
  - [Schedule 1-hour strategy alignment session for next week](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=3399.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop initial set of "calibration" articles for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/NiVRFDBTRWGV5wy6jw1xydA9ugd7S7f1?tab=summary&timestamp=2487.0)

action_items.description: Send doc to GrowthX outlining customer pain points for ITSM solutions
Update and reorder competitor list in Notion, including smaller/newer competitors
Provide GrowthX team access to Webflow CMS
Review brand document in Notion, add missing info, correct inaccuracies
Review brand document in Notion after Carmel's pass, add/correct info
Share next steps and meeting notes in Slack channel
Schedule 1hr follow-up session for next week, share time options in Slack
